name: alphadb-platform
description: AlphaDB prediction-market platform with API, web client, and ANSI TUI.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c auto "npm run dev --workspace @alphadb/api" "npm run dev --workspace @alphadb/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @alphadb/api && npm run build --workspace @alphadb/web && npm run build --workspace @alphadb/tui
